name: Apple Pie-2
recipeIngredient: Apples (use Granny Smith or your preferred variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use an apple such as Granny Smith. Use as many apples as you prefer to make a thick pie.
2. Place the apples in an unbaked pie crust.
3. In a bowl, mix 3/4 cup brown sugar with 2 tablespoons tapioca. Let the mixture sit for 15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, sprinkle 4 tablespoons lemon juice over the apples.
5. Pour the tapioca mixture onto the apples and lemon juice.
6. Add cinnamon, nutmeg, and 1/2 cup sugar to the pie.
7. Place the second crust on top.
8. Pinch the edges of the crusts together.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1-1 1/2 hours until nicely browned.
